mission.title: etcd: clientv3: grpc-go (v1.27.0) made API changes to balancer / resolver.
mission.description: clientv3: grpc-go (v1.27.0) made API changes to balancer / resolver.. Users encounter: "occurred while pulling etcd / clientv3. The steps to reproduce it are as follows:".

steps.title: Identify etcd feature symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your etcd deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=etcd
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=etcd -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for error: `occurred while pulling etcd / clientv3. The steps to reproduce it are as follows:`

steps.title: Check current resource configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant etcd resources:
```bash
kubectl get resource -A
kubectl describe resource <name> -n <namespace>
```
After the release of grpc-go v1.27.0, an error occurred while pulling etcd / clientv3. The steps to reproduce it are as follows:

1. go.mod:

```
go 1.13

require (
	github.com/coreos/etcd v3.3.18+inc

steps.title: Apply the fix for clientv3: grpc-go (v1.27.0) made API changes to balancer / r
steps.description:
clientv3: Fix grpc-go (v1.27.0) incompatible modification of balancer/resolver API.

Modify the API changed by balancer / resolver to ensure consistency with grpc-go (v1.27.0), otherwise clientv3 will not be able to be pulled by go mod, which will affect the direct use of users.

References:
1. [bal
```yaml
go 1.13

require (
	github.com/coreos/etcd v3.3.18+incompatible // indirect
	github.com/coreos/go-systemd v0.0.0-00010101000000-000000000000 // indirect
	github.com/coreos/pkg v0.0.0-20180928190104-399ea9e2e55f // indirect
	github.com/gogo/protobuf v1.3.1 // indirect
	github.com/google/uuid v1.1.1 // indirect
	go.etcd.io/etcd v3.3.18+incompatible // indirect
	go.uber.org/zap v1.13.0 // indirect
	google.golang.org/grpc v1.27.0 // indirect
)

replace github.com/coreos/go-systemd => github.com/coreos/go-systemd/v22 v22.0.0
```

steps.title: Confirm clientv3: grpc-go (v1.27.0) made API changes to ba is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=etcd -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that `occurred while pulling etcd / clientv3. The steps to reproduce it are as follows:` no longer appears in logs.

resolution.summary:
The root cause is: clientv3: Fix grpc-go (v1.27.0) incompatible modification of balancer/resolver API.

Modify the API changed by balancer / resolver to ensure consistency with grpc-go (v1.27.0), otherwise clientv3 will not be able to be pulled by go mod, which will affect the direct use of users.

References:
1. [balancer/resolver: remove temporary backward-compatibility type aliases](https://github.com/grpc/grpc-g. This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.
codeSnippets:
go 1.13

require (
	github.com/coreos/etcd v3.3.18+incompatible // indirect
	github.com/coreos/go-systemd v0.0.0-00010101000000-000000000000 // indirect
	github.com/coreos/pkg v0.0.0-20180928190104-399ea9e2e55f // indirect
	github.com/gogo/protobuf v1.3.1 // indirect
	github.com/google/uuid v1.1.1 // indirect
	go.etcd.io/etcd v3.3.18+incompatible // indirect
	go.uber.org/zap v1.13.0 // indirect
	google.golang.org/grpc v1.27.0 // indirect
)

replace github.com/coreos/go-systemd => github.com/coreos/go-systemd/v22 v22.0.0

$ go get go.etcd.io/etcd/clientv3
# github.com/coreos/etcd/clientv3/balancer/resolver/endpoint
../../go/pkg/mod/github.com/coreos/etcd@v3.3.18+incompatible/clientv3/balancer/resolver/endpoint/endpoint.go:114:78: undefined: resolver.BuildOption
../../go/pkg/mod/github.com/coreos/etcd@v3.3.18+incompatible/clientv3/balancer/resolver/endpoint/endpoint.go:182:31: undefined: resolver.ResolveNowOption
# github.com/coreos/etcd/clientv3/balancer/picker
../../go/pkg/mod/github.com/coreos/etcd@v3.3.18+incompatible/clientv3/balancer/picker/err.go:37:44: undefined: balancer.PickOptions
../../go/pkg/mod/github.com/coreos/etcd@v3.3.18+incompatible/clientv3/balancer/picker/roundrobin_balanced.go:55:54: undefined: balancer.PickOptions

require google.golang.org/grpc v1.26.0
replace github.com/coreos/go-systemd => github.com/coreos/go-systemd/v22 v22.0.0

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with etcd installed or the issue environment reproducible.
